impact_description: Consumer perception of pre-made food fundamentally shifted. Government standards claims became irrelevant — consumers reject any association with central kitchen processing. 90%+ negative sentiment. Brand lost significant market share and closed multiple locations.
invalidated_strategies: Promoting central kitchen as quality assurance
Citing national standards as consumer trust signal
Pre-made food transparency as marketing angle
new_required_strategies: Absolute transparency about food preparation methods
Consumer perception management over legal compliance
Crisis response preparedness for KOL attacks

impact_description: Market regulators cracked down on non-medical devices using medical terminology. Medical efficacy language on a consumer wellness product triggered investigation under advertising law.
invalidated_strategies: Using medical efficacy language for non-medical products
new_required_strategies: Strict advertising law compliance review before any content publication

impact_description: A demo regulatory shift invalidates pre-August 2025 food marketing strategies.
